examples: The kinetics of polyesterification of phthalic anhydride with diethylene glycol was investigated.
The esterification, polyesterification, polycondensation and the formation of diethylene glycol (DEG) reaction kinetic parameters were obtained.
Both the kinetic data of the present study and those of Flory for the polyesterification of ethylene glycol and adipic acid do not exactly follow the 21/2 order kinetic equation.
